use_cases: Creating bold, visually striking grid layouts for dashboards and landing pages
Building feature showcase sections with high-contrast brutalist styling
Organizing content cards in portfolio or product showcase pages
Designing SaaS product feature grids with raw, geometric aesthetics
ai_summary: A brutalist-styled atomic bento grid item component designed for creating bold, high-contrast grid layouts. Features thick borders, raw geometric shapes, and strong visual hierarchy typical of neobrutalism design. Forms the building block for larger bento grid systems used in dashboards, landing pages, and product showcases across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
